meta.description: Crypto-native super app for digital nomads. Virtual cards, travel bookings, and eSIM powered by stablecoins.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Up and Running in Minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: From sign-up to your first payment — under 5 minutes, no paperwork.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Open an account in 2 minutes. Facial verification only — no paperwork, no branch visits.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Top up via bank transfer, crypto wallet, or debit card. Funds available instantly.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Virtual Visa/Mastercard issued in under 30 seconds. Add to Apple Pay or Google Pay.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Pay at 100M+ merchants worldwide with 0% FX. Book flights, hotels, and eSIM in-app.

ecosystem.label: Ecosystem
ecosystem.title: One App. Everything You Need.
ecosystem.subtitle: Banking, travel, and connectivity — united in a single super app so you never need another financial service again.

banking.title: Banking & Cards
banking.description: A real Visa/Mastercard funded by stablecoins. Spend anywhere, earn DeFi yield on your balance, borrow against crypto without selling.
banking.highlight: Zero hidden fees, zero FX spread
banking.feature1: Virtual & physical cards funded with USDT/USDC
banking.feature3: Instant card issuance in under 30 seconds

travel.title: Travel & Bookings
travel.description: Skip Booking.com markups. Direct access to wholesale Net-Rate prices on 180,000+ hotels and flights via Duffel, Hotelbeds, and Expedia.
travel.feature2: Flights via Duffel API — pay in stablecoins

connectivity.title: Global eSIM
connectivity.description: Land in a new country, tap once — you're online. No roaming charges, no physical SIM swap, no setup.
connectivity.feature2: Pay in stablecoins at competitive data rates
connectivity.feature3: Auto-connect when landing in a new country

security.title: Bank-Grade Security, Consumer Simplicity
security.subtitle: Your assets are protected by the same cryptography used by institutional custodians — with zero complexity for you.
security.userSubtitle: You see simplicity. We handle the complexity behind the scenes.
security.userFeature1Desc: FaceID or fingerprint — no passwords to remember
security.userFeature2Desc: No seed phrases, no complex addresses
security.techSubtitle: Threshold Signature Scheme splits your private key across isolated environments — no single point of failure.
security.techDescription: No single point of failure. Not even Frameless can access your assets without your device's biometric confirmation. Full non-custodial architecture with institutional-grade compliance.

personas.subtitle: One account for everyone who earns, spends, or travels across borders.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before registering for beta.
faq.q1: Is my crypto safe with Frameless?
faq.a1: Frameless uses a non-custodial MPC wallet — your private key is split between your device's Secure Enclave and our isolated cloud environment. Not even Frameless can access your assets without your biometric confirmation. No seed phrases to lose or store.
faq.a2: The virtual card works at 100M+ merchants in 200+ countries. The USD account supports wire transfers globally. Travel booking covers 180,000+ hotels and flights globally. eSIM is available in 200+ countries instantly.
faq.q3: How is Frameless different from Revolut or Wise?
faq.a3: Revolut and Wise are fiat-first — crypto is just an add-on. Frameless is crypto-native: your balance earns DeFi yield automatically, you can borrow against crypto without selling, and travel booking accepts stablecoins. You also keep full control of your keys.
faq.q4: Do I need to pass KYC?
faq.a4: Frameless uses tiered verification. Basic features are accessible with minimal checks. For the debit card and USD account, standard KYC applies — facial recognition takes about 2 minutes, fully in-app.
faq.a5: 0% FX on all card transactions. No hidden spreads on crypto payments. Travel bookings have no markups — you pay wholesale Net-Rate prices. We charge a transparent monthly subscription instead of per-transaction fees.
faq.q6: Can I use Apple Pay and Google Pay?
faq.a6: Yes. Your Frameless card is fully compatible with Apple Pay and Google Pay for contactless payments anywhere in the world.
faq.a7: We connect to wholesale travel APIs (Duffel for flights, Hotelbeds and Expedia for hotels, 12Go for ground transport). You pay with stablecoins or your card balance at Net-Rate prices — up to 25% cheaper than consumer platforms like Booking.com.
faq.a8: Frameless is building toward full multi-jurisdiction licensing: VARA (UAE) for virtual asset operations and MiCA compliance for EU. Client funds are safeguarded under the EU e-money directive framework.
faq.a9: Beta is coming soon. Register now to be among the first to get access — early registrants get priority onboarding, lifetime fee discounts, and a founding member badge.
